title: Resolve circular dependencies across packages
description: Circular dependencies between classes in different packages make code harder to maintain and test. Breaking these cycles improves modularity, reduces complexity, and helps prevent unintended side effects. Refactor code to eliminate such dependencies for better architecture.
recommendation: Identify and refactor code to remove circular dependencies between packages, using interfaces or dependency inversion where appropriate.

checks.message: Identify and refactor code to remove circular dependencies between packages, using interfaces or dependency inversion where appropriate.
